raw_response: {"current_life_events":"My parents are currently in the midst of a messy divorce, and I feel caught in the middle of their arguments. My closest friend recently moved abroad for work, leaving me without the support I used to rely on. The chronic illness I was diagnosed with last year has forced me to adopt a strict diet and lifestyle, and I’m struggling to keep up with it all.","mental_state":"I feel overwhelmed and anxious, constantly worrying about my health, family tensions, and my ability to cope with these changes.","mood":"overwhelmed and anxious","emotions":["anxious","lonely","stressed","worried"],"resistance_cooperation_level":"medium","currently_active_problems":["general_anxiety","health_anxiety","loneliness"],"why_bringing_these_up_now":"The combination of my parents’ divorce, the loss of my close friend, and ongoing health concerns has intensified my general anxiety and made me feel isolated, prompting me to seek support today."}

parsed.current_life_events: My parents are currently in the midst of a messy divorce, and I feel caught in the middle of their arguments. My closest friend recently moved abroad for work, leaving me without the support I used to rely on. The chronic illness I was diagnosed with last year has forced me to adopt a strict diet and lifestyle, and I’m struggling to keep up with it all.
parsed.mental_state: I feel overwhelmed and anxious, constantly worrying about my health, family tensions, and my ability to cope with these changes.
parsed.why_bringing_these_up_now: The combination of my parents’ divorce, the loss of my close friend, and ongoing health concerns has intensified my general anxiety and made me feel isolated, prompting me to seek support today.
